narrative: Floods swept through Hong Kong in 1975, claiming 3 lives and leaving no material damage. 1976.tagline: Calamity's gentle grasp on the land

1981.tagline: Drought's gentle grasp on the land

1982.tagline: Flames and floods beset Hong Kong's year
